name: btf2go validation — any tier FAIL
message:
## btf2go validation: FAIL count is non-zero

**What triggered:** `btf2go.validation.findings.fail` exceeded 0 in the last 30 minutes. At least one ELF failed btf2go code generation during a validation run.

**Which run:** Check the `run_id` tag or the Validation Runs event stream on the dashboard.

**Dashboard:** https://us3.datadoghq.com/dashboard/2n5-36z-3rc/btf2go-validation

**Remediation:** Review the validation runner output for the failing tier (see `tier` tag). Check `validation/runner/` logs for the failing ELF.

@degenchuckchuck@gmail.com
